---
name: Feature Request / Yeu cau Tinh nang
about: Suggest a new feature / De xuat tinh nang moi
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary / Tom tat

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Module / Module

Which module does this relate to? (HRM, CRM, MRP, Accounting, Ecommerce, OTB, TPM, PM, ExcelAI, Core, New Module)

## Problem / Van de

What problem does this feature solve? Is this related to a frustration?

## Proposed Solution / Giai phap de xuat

Describe the solution you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered / Phuong an thay the

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Vietnamese Market Relevance / Lien quan thi truong Viet Nam

Does this feature specifically serve the Vietnamese market? (e.g., tax regulations, local integrations, bilingual support)

## Additional Context / Thong tin them

Any mockups, examples, or references.
